Page.safeArea: boolean | undefined — 是否在末尾附加 SafeArea
Page.full: boolean | undefined — 是否附加 lyrixi-full，默认 true
Page.layout: 'horizontal' | 'vertical' | undefined — 页面 flex 布局方向

Page.Header.safeArea: boolean | undefined — 是否附加 SafeArea

Page.Main.threshold: number | undefined — 下拉刷新触发阈值，默认 50
Page.Main.safeArea: boolean | undefined — 是否附加 SafeArea
Page.Main.touchStopPropagation: boolean | undefined — 触摸事件是否阻止冒泡，默认 true
Page.Main.onTopRefresh: () => boolean | string | undefined | Promise<boolean | string | undefined> — 下拉刷新回调
Page.Main.onBottomRefresh: () => void | Promise<void> — 触底加载回调
Page.Main.onScrollEnd: (e) => void | undefined — 停止滚动后的回调

Page.Footer.safeArea: boolean | undefined — 是否附加 SafeArea
